title: sphaeromorphaea australis
intro: Sphaeromorphaea australis, also known as the Australian globe daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Sphaeromorphaea australis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit antioxidant properties that can protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Sphaeromorphaea australis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications for various health benefits.
